description: A guest in a luxury suite complains that it is too cold.

nodes.task_description: Access the building management system (BMS) to check the temperature and thermostat settings for that suite.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the thermostat is set to 65°F.

nodes.task_description: Remotely adjust the thermostat for the suite to a more comfortable temperature (e.g., 70°F).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully changes the thermostat setting.

nodes.task_description: Inform the guest that the temperature has been adjusted and will warm up shortly.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent communicates the resolution to the guest.
